description: Research Object Builder for Open Toxicology.

intro.title: Introduction to Research Object Builder for Open Toxicology (ROBOT)

_ins_ELIXIR: Information regarding sources available on ELIXIR.
_ins_NAM-validation: Information about NAM validation stage as described in the 2017 RIVM report (https://www.rivm.nl/documenten/landschap-3v-methoden-risicobeoordeling-chemische-stoffen), Answer whether the service has completed the stage using as 'yes' or 'no'.
_ins_VHP-persona: Whether the service is used by one or more of the VHP persona's. Answer as 'true' or 'false' (e.g., persona-1: 'true' to attribute a service to a persona).
_ins_regulatory-question: Whether the service is relevant to any of the regulatory questions (https://docs.vhp4safety.nl/en/latest/introduction/case_studies_and_regulatory_questions.html). Answer either 'true' or 'false'

regulatory-question._ins_1a: 1a: What is a safe dose for cisplatin/tacrolimus in patients with respect to chronic kidney disease?
regulatory-question._ins_1b: 1b: How can we take into account variability in activity/expression of P-gp in patients that underwent a transplantation?
regulatory-question._ins_2a: 2a: Can compound X cause Parkinson’s Disease?
regulatory-question._ins_2b: 2b: Can we identify groups at extra risk to develop Parkinson’s Disease after exposure to compound X?
regulatory-question._ins_3a: 3a: What information about a substance do we need to give an advice to women in their early pregnancy to decide whether the substance can be used?
regulatory-question._ins_3b: 3b: Does compound X influence the thyroid-mediated brain development in the fetus resulting in cognitive impairment in children?
